schedule.description: Story 1 — Play-In tips off tomorrow, full matchup breakdown
Story 2 — Bracket locked, Nuggets clinch No. 3
Story 5 — NBA Awards preview (SGA, Wemby, Knueppel)

stories.title: NBA Play-In Tournament Preview — Starts Tomorrow on Prime Video

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
🚨 PLAY-IN TIPS OFF TOMORROW 🚨

The 2026 NBA Play-In Tournament:

• Hornets vs. Heat — Tue 7:30 PM ET
• Suns vs. Blazers — Tue 10 PM ET
• 76ers vs. Magic — Wed 7:30 PM ET
• Clippers vs. Warriors — Wed 10 PM ET

All on Prime Video. All must-watch.

#HoopHeroes #NBAPlayIn #NBA

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
BOLD TAKE: Kawhi drops 30 tonight and the Clippers END the Curry era in the Play-In.

Warriors are beat up. Kawhi is at a CAREER HIGH 27.9 PPG.

Prime Video. Wednesday. 10 PM ET.

Who you got? 🏀

#HoopHeroes #NBAPlayIn

article.headline: Eight Teams, Four Spots: Your Complete 2026 NBA Play-In Tournament Preview

research.facts:
NBA Play-In Tournament Preview
**Sources:**
1. NBA.com — "2026 Play-In Tournament" official page (matchups, schedule, rules confirmed)
2. NBC Sports — "NBA Play-In Tournament 2026: Schedule, how does it work, which teams are in, how to watch" (April 13, 2026)
3. Yahoo Sports — "NBA Play-In Tournament 2026: Schedule, matchups, how it works" (April 13, 2026)
4. Fox Sports — "NBA play-in games are set: Heat-Hornets, Magic-76ers, Suns-Blazers, Clippers-Warriors" (April 13, 2026)
5. ABC News wire — Same Fox Sports report confirmed
**Verified Facts (HIGH):**
- Play-In Tournament runs April 14-17, 2026
- All games exclusive on Prime Video
- East matchups: Hornets (No. 9) vs. Heat (No. 10) — Tuesday April 14, 7:30 PM ET; 76ers (No. 7) vs. Magic (No. 8) — Wednesday April 15, 7:30 PM ET
- West matchups: Suns (No. 7) vs. Blazers (No. 8) — Tuesday April 14, 10 PM ET; Clippers (No. 9) vs. Warriors (No. 10) — Wednesday April 15, 10 PM ET
- Final games (loser of 7/8 vs. winner of 9/10): Friday April 17, 7:30 PM ET (East), 10 PM ET (West)
- NBA Playoffs begin Saturday April 18
- Winners of 7/8 games advance as No. 7 seeds; losers get second chance vs. 9/10 winner
**Freshness:** Tournament starts tomorrow — maximum relevance

stories.title: NBA Final Standings Locked — Nuggets Clinch No. 3 West Seed

x_posts.label: Post 2

THE 2026 NBA BRACKET IS SET.

EAST:

WEST:

article.headline: 2026 NBA Playoff Bracket Is Set: Nuggets Clinch No. 3, Full First-Round Matchups Confirmed

research.facts:
Final NBA Standings / Bracket
**Sources:**
1. Yahoo Sports — "NBA playoffs: Nuggets secure No. 3 seed with win over Spurs, sending Lakers to No. 4" (April 12-13, 2026)
2. Eurohoops — "NBA results and final standings: Denver Nuggets clinch third seed" (April 13, 2026)
3. CBS Sports — "2026 NBA playoff picture: standings, tiebreakers" (April 13, 2026)
4. NBA.com — "2026 NBA Playoffs: Standings, bracket and clinching updates"
5. SI.com — "2026 NBA Playoffs: Full Bracket Ahead of Play-In Tournament"
**Verified Facts (HIGH):**
- Nuggets beat Spurs 128-118 on April 12 (regular season finale); Nuggets resting starters, Wemby out for Spurs
- Denver Nuggets finish 54-28 (No. 3 West seed)
- Los Angeles Lakers finish 53-29 (No. 4 West seed)
- OKC Thunder: No. 1 West (best record in NBA, ~64 wins)
- San Antonio Spurs: No. 2 West (62-20)
- East final: Pistons No. 1, Celtics No. 2, Knicks No. 3, Cavs No. 4
- East No. 5: Hawks; No. 6: Raptors; Play-In: 76ers, Magic, Hornets, Heat
- West No. 5: Rockets; No. 6: Wolves; Play-In: Suns, Blazers, Clippers, Warriors
- Confirmed first-round (non-Play-In): Knicks (3) vs Raptors (6); Cavs (4) vs Hawks (5); Nuggets (3) vs Wolves (6); Lakers (4) vs Rockets (5)
**MEDIUM confidence:**
- OKC exact final record 64-18 (Eurohoops — confirmed post-season finale; pipeline had 64-16 through April 11, which is pre-final-day)
**Freshness:** Final standings confirmed yesterday — directly relevant to Play-In preview

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Kawhi Leonard. Career-high 27.9 PPG.
Steph Curry. Two-time MVP. Depleted Warriors.

Wednesday. 10 PM ET. Prime Video.

Clippers beat the Warriors on Sunday 115-110.

Kawhi is LOCKED IN. This is his moment.

#HoopHeroes #NBAPlayIn #Warriors #Clippers

article.headline: Kawhi vs. Curry: Clippers-Warriors Play-In Is the Best Game Nobody Is Talking About

research.facts:
Clippers-Warriors Play-In Preview
**Sources:**
1. Press Democrat — "Warriors-Clippers play-in preview: Breaking down keys in familiar matchup" (April 12, 2026)
2. SI.com — "Kawhi Leonard Game Status Revealed for Sunday's Warriors-Clippers Game" (April 12, 2026)
3. VAVEL — "Warriors 110-115 Clippers in NBA 04/12/2026" (season finale score confirmed)
4. Yardbarker — "Warriors vs Clippers Injury Report" (April 12, 2026)
**Verified Facts (HIGH):**
- Kawhi Leonard averaging career-high 27.9 PPG this season
- Darius Garland (acquired from Cavaliers in trade) averaging 20.2 PPG, 6.7 APG with Clippers
- Stephen Curry averaging 26.6 PPG, 3.5 RPG, 4.8 APG
- Clippers won season series 3-1 (won season finale 115-110 on April 12)
- Warriors injuries: Jimmy Butler out for season (knee); Moses Moody out
- Clippers-Warriors Play-In game: Intuit Dome, Wednesday April 15, 10 PM ET on Prime Video
- Clippers: No. 9 West; Warriors: No. 10 West
**Freshness:** Game is Wednesday — preview is timely

Winner gets No. 7 seed and faces the Celtics.

No pressure. 😬

#HoopHeroes #NBAPlayIn #Sixers

article.headline: Embiid Out: Can the 76ers Survive the Play-In Without Their Franchise Center?

research.facts:
76ers-Magic Play-In Preview
**Sources:**
1. 97.5 The Fanatic — "Sixers To Face Magic in NBA Play-In Tournament" (April 12, 2026)
2. DraftKings Network — "Opening odds for Magic vs. 76ers 2026 NBA Play-In Tournament game" (April 12, 2026)
3. SI.com (Philadelphia) — Game overview for April 15 Play-In game
4. ClutchPoints — "76ers' dream seeding, matchup scenarios for 2026 NBA Playoffs"
**Verified Facts (HIGH):**
- 76ers host Magic on Wednesday April 15 at 7:30 PM ET, Prime Video
- Joel Embiid out indefinitely (major injury)
- Magic are -1.5 favorites, -122 ML (DraftKings)
- 76ers won regular-season series 2-1
- Winner faces Celtics (No. 2 seed) in first round
- Desmond Bane was acquired by Orlando from Memphis for draft capital
**MEDIUM confidence:**
- Orlando Magic "fell short of expectations" this season (from search summary, qualitative)
**Freshness:** Game is Wednesday — preview is timely

#HoopHeroes #NBAMVP #NBA

article.headline: The 2026 NBA Awards Are Coming: SGA's Back-to-Back, Wemby's DPOY, and the Year's Best Rookie

research.facts:
2026 NBA Awards Preview
**Sources:**
1. Yahoo Sports — "2026 NBA Awards Ballot: SGA for MVP, Kon Knueppel for Rookie of the Year"
2. NBC Sports — "2026 NBA DPOY predictions: It's Victor Wembanyama. Duh."
3. Air Alamo — "Victor Wembanyama will officially join elite Spurs DPOY list with historic twist" (unanimous expected)
4. NGSCS Sports — "2026 NBA Awards Preview: SGA's Repeat Quest and the Wemby Era of Defense" (April 11, 2026)
5. Yahoo Sports — "When are the NBA's MVP, DPOY, MIP and other 2025-26 season award winners announced?"
**Verified Facts (HIGH):**
- SGA: 31.6 PPG (scoring title), 6.5 APG, 4.4 RPG, 1.4 SPG; 88/100 ESPN first-place votes; OKC best record in NBA
- Wemby: leads league in blocks (3.1 BPG); DPOY expected unanimous; -5000 BetMGM odds; age 22
- Kon Knueppel: 265 three-pointers (obliterated Keegan Murray's 206 record); 43% from 3; ROY frontrunner
- Awards announced late April through May (based on historical precedent; first award ~April 22)
**MEDIUM confidence:**
- Daigneault as COY frontrunner (multiple sources say this but not from official voting)
**Freshness:** Playoff season = awards season — highly relevant

stories.title: Spurs Enter Playoffs as No. 2 Seed with Historic 62-20 Record

x_posts.label: Post 6
x_posts.text:
The Spurs are BACK.

62-20. No. 2 seed. First Southwest Division title since 2017.

Victor Wembanyama. Age 22. First NBA Playoff run incoming.

No team in the West wants to face San Antonio right now.

#HoopHeroes #Spurs #NBAPlayoffs

article.headline: Spurs Back in the Playoffs at 62-20 — And Wembanyama's First Postseason Run Begins April 18

research.facts:
Spurs Enter Playoffs
**Sources:**
1. CBS Sports — "Spurs letting Victor Wembanyama play 65th game was a risk, but a better playoff path could be their reward"
2. Heavy Sports — "Spurs Reveal Final Victor Wembanyama Injury Status vs Nuggets"
3. NBC Washington — "2026 NBA playoffs bracket is set. See the first-round matchups"
**Verified Facts (HIGH):**
- Spurs finish 62-20 (No. 2 West seed)
- First Southwest Division title since 2017
- Wemby sat out April 12 finale (sore left ribcage)
- Wemby secured award eligibility April 11 (65th game, 40 pts in 26:13 min vs Mavs)
- Spurs await Play-In winner (7th seed from Suns/Blazers game) for first-round opponent
- Spurs' first playoff appearance since 2019
**Freshness:** Playoffs start April 18 — context piece

stories.title: NBA Playoffs 2026 — Five Storylines to Watch

#HoopHeroes #NBAPlayoffs

research.facts:
NBA Playoffs Storylines
**Sources:**
1. ESPN — "NBA playoffs 2026: Previewing all 20 teams still vying for the title" (April 13, 2026)
2. Yahoo Sports — "2026 NBA playoffs: matchups, schedule, play-in bracket"
**Verified Facts (HIGH):**
- Luka Doncic out entire postseason (Grade 2 hamstring; confirmed out rest of season April 8)
- 20 teams remain (16 playoff + 4 play-in)
- OKC is the favorite with best record; Pistons top East seed
- Wemby's first-ever NBA playoff series
**Freshness:** Opening night angle — evergreen leading into playoffs
